name: excalidraw-live
description: ExcaliDraw Live — Production-grade realtime collaborative whiteboard using React, Excalidraw, Node.js, WebSocket, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
